combined_text: Eurocentric Eurocentric (redirected from Eurocentricity) Also found in: Thesaurus, Encyclopedia. Related to Eurocentricity: Eurocentrist Eu·ro·cen·tric (yo͝or′ō-sĕn′trĭk)adj. Centered or focused on Europe or European peoples, especially in relation to historical or cultural influence. Eu′ro·cen′trism n. Eu′ro·c
